summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SY Homes Entities module (Prompt 1.1). All 31 backend API tests passed. Frontend CRUD, filtering, search, hierarchy navigation, and insurance badge highlighting all working correctly.

issues: ESLint warning: React Hook useEffect has missing dependency 'navigate' - minor warning, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Insurance badge highlighting correctly implements 60/30/14/7/0 day thresholds
Form validation with Zod works on blur as expected
Unique constraints on Companies House and VAT numbers enforced with 409 responses
Circular parent chain prevention working correctly
seed_data_creation: Used TEST_ prefix for all test entities, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_entities_api.py. All CRUD operations, validation, hierarchy, and insurance alerts tested. Frontend uses data-testid attributes throughout. Insurance badge urgency levels: expired (<0 days), critical (<=14 days), warning (<=60 days), ok (>60 days).

backend: GET /api/meta/tenant - returns SY Homes tenant with UUID
GET /api/meta/enums - returns all 5 enums with expected values
Struck_off status hidden by default, visible with filter
GET /api/meta/insurance-alerts - returns alerts with correct severity
frontend: Entities list page loads with 3 seeded entities
Sidebar shows Entities active, other modules disabled with 'Soon'
Clicking row navigates to detail page
Detail page shows all 8 sections (Identity, Tax, Addresses, Insurance, Banking, Xero, Hierarchy, Notes)
SY Homes Ltd shows 2 children in hierarchy
New entity form with validation on blur
Create entity navigates to detail page
Filter by type updates URL params
Insurance badge highlighting: expired (red), critical (red), warning (amber), ok (neutral)
